class.name: unitree_g1_forward_command_controller/ForwardCommandController
class.description: Whole-body forward position controller with command timeout and jump protection.

class.name: unitree_g1_broadcasters/JointStateBroadcaster
class.description: Standard Foxy joint-state broadcaster with a configurable publish-rate gate.

class.name: unitree_g1_broadcasters/ImuSensorBroadcaster
class.description: Standard Foxy IMU broadcaster with a configurable publish-rate gate.
